rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods core of the study, not just in a background list. The citing paper explicitly relies on Baumgartner and Steenkamp (2006) to motivate longitudinal measurement-stability assessment and the practice of modeling temporally adjacent item residual covariances in panel CFA. It is also referenced as a source for at least one trait measure used in the study (brand loyalty), indicating practical reuse of that prior measurement work.
relation_description: The citing paper applies elements of the cited paper's longitudinal measurement-analysis approach to its 12-year panel setting, especially invariance-oriented measurement checks and adjacent residual covariance handling. It also draws on the cited paper's scale operationalization for trait measurement.
